The Beauty of Imperfection
Scroll

We believe design can heal. Beauty can hold. Nature transforms everything from the inside out.

What We Do

We create artistic compositions using preserved moss and natural materials — sculptures, murals, and objects that turn spaces into sanctuaries of calm and contemplation.

Each piece is born to inhabit a wall, yes, but also to inhabit a state of being. A pause. A green breath. A living presence.

A beauty that doesn’t demand attention, yet truly deserves it.

Botanical art
that goes beyond
decoration.

Living Matter

The natural, living essence of preserved moss. Nature in its purest state.

Each piece born from inspiration that never repeats.

The Artist

Ana Silva

Founder & Creative Director

Born in Caracas, Ana expressed an artistic sensitivity from a young age — channeled first through graphic design, then through jewelry-making in Italy.

Life’s disruptions led her through continents and chapters: motherhood, loss, reinvention. Each one deepened her creative voice.

Today she finds peace in the plant world — merging years of craft and soul into compositions that breathe harmony, like moss that revives after every cut.

A creative soul who finds beauty in every texture, and transforms each space into a living sanctuary.

The Process

How It’s Made

01

Consultation

We begin with your space — understanding architecture, light, and the emotion you want to inhabit.

02

Curation

Ana selects each botanical element. Preserved mosses, natural woods, dried ferns — chosen for texture and feeling.

03

Creation

Assembled in the studio, layer by layer. The composition grows organically — no two are ever the same.

04

Installation

Delivered in luxury packaging and placed with care. Your space transforms with a quiet, living presence.

Your space deserves
a natural pause.

For private residences, hotel lobbies, or any space that needs to breathe.
